title: Complete Testing & Quality Pipeline
description: Full quality stack: Vitest for unit/integration tests, Playwright for end-to-end browser tests, ESLint for static analysis, and GitHub Actions to run everything automatically on every push.

steps.description: Set up Vitest for unit and integration tests with jsdom, coverage reports, and path alias support
Add Playwright for end-to-end browser tests across Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit
Configure ESLint flat config for static analysis, catching errors before tests run
Configure CI to run Vitest, Playwright, and ESLint on every push and pull request
